hero.headline: About talentsCARE
hero.description: We are your partner for successful integration and sustainable collaboration in a global work environment.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: We believe in a work world where diversity is seen as strength and cultural differences are experienced as enrichment. Our mission is to build bridges between companies and international talents.
mission.paragraph2: With passion, expertise, and a deep understanding of intercultural dynamics, we accompany both sides on their common path to success. We create spaces for encounter, foster understanding, and develop sustainable solutions for the challenges of a globalized work world.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.description: We meet all people with appreciation, respect, and genuine interest in their individual story.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for highest quality in everything we do and continuously develop ourselves.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act transparently, reliably, and responsibly in all our relationships.

diversity.title: Diversity
diversity.description: We celebrate differences and see cultural diversity as a source of innovation and strength.

approach.headline: Our Approach
approach.description: We combine solid expertise with practical experience and a holistic view of integration and collaboration.

step1.title: Analysis & Understanding
step1.description: We listen and analyze your specific situation and challenges.

step2.title: Concept & Strategy
step2.description: We develop tailored solutions that fit your goals and resources.

step3.title: Implementation & Support
step3.description: We stay by your side and ensure sustainable results.

cta.headline: Let's Write Success Stories Together
cta.description: Contact us for a non-binding initial consultation.

section1.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
section1.content: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified.

section2.title: 2. Data Collection on This Website
section2.content: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. Their contact details can be found in the imprint of this website. Your data is collected partly by you communicating it to us, for example through entries in a contact form.

section3.title: 3. Analysis Tools and Third-Party Tools
section3.content: When visiting this website, your surfing behavior can be statistically evaluated. This is done primarily with so-called analysis programs. Detailed information about these analysis programs can be found in the following sections of this privacy policy.

section4.title: 4. Your Rights
section4.content: You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data at any time. You also have a right to request the correction or deletion of this data.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.content: If you have any questions about data protection, you can contact us at any time. The contact details can be found in the imprint of this website.

responsible.title: Responsible for Content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
responsible.name: Dr. Maria Schmidt

section1.title: 1. Scope
section1.content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all contracts between talentsCARE GmbH and its clients for the provision of consulting and training services.

section2.title: 2. Contract Conclusion
section2.content: The contract is concluded by the client's acceptance of the offer. Acceptance can be made in writing, orally, or through implied action.

section3.title: 3. Scope of Services
section3.content: The scope of services to be provided is defined in the respective offer or service description. Changes to the scope of services require written agreement.

section4.title: 4. Remuneration and Payment Terms
section4.content: Remuneration is based on the currently valid price list. Invoices are due for payment within 14 days of the invoice date without deduction.

section5.title: 5. Liability
section5.content: We are fully liable for intent and gross negligence. In case of slight negligence, we are only liable for breach of essential contractual obligations.
